name: Crockpot Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt margarine over medium heat. Add chopped onion and celery; sauté until tender, about 7 minutes.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (mushrooms, parsley, salt, sage, thyme, bread cubes, soup, and egg) into the skillet. Mix well to combine.
3. Transfer the mixture to the crockpot. Cover and cook on high for 45 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for an additional 5 to 8 hours, or until the cubes are moistened by the liquid. Adjust the amount of liquid if needed based on the size of your recipe (e.g., for a larger batch, double all ingredients except the soup).
